content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of needing no extra training or supervision data. This pipeline fixes the common flaw of single-perspective self-refinement where LLMs tend to repeat their own initial blind spots by leveraging inconsistent reasoning perspectives to catch unaddressed errors.
